source_pages.evidence: Official IFS search page readback shows 20 competitions and page 1 entries from ADOPT Facilitator Support Grant: Round 10 through Innovation Loans Expression of Interest.
Official IFS search page readback shows page 2 entries from Full ADOPT Grant: Round 8 through Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Deployment trials.

official_competitions.name: ADOPT Facilitator Support Grant: Round 10
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Active farming, growing or forestry business based in England.

official_competitions.name: UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: UK business lead must involve a grant-claiming UK SME, Swiss implementation partner, and at least one research institute.
local_gates: Swiss implementation partner, research institute or waiver, partner commitment, cost split, permits/licences, export-control, project finance, Project Impact persistence, award terms, and final review evidence required.

official_competitions.name: Scaling performance of quantum computing hardware: CR&D
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; lead must be UK registered business or RTO.

official_competitions.name: DRIVE35 Innovation Fund: Collaborate 3
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; UK registered business can lead.

official_competitions.name: Next Wave: Breakthrough Wave 1
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Single UK SME or UK SME lead for collaboration.
local_gates: Waiting for funder eligibility checks and assessment.

official_competitions.name: CfI: Earlier identification of UK children with SEN
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Single legal entity contract route.
local_gates: Waiting for funder eligibility checks and assessment.

official_competitions.name: Future Leaders Fellowships: Round 11, business and non-academic
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Single applicants with supporting organisations; eligible host can be UK registered business.
local_gates: Waiting for funder eligibility checks and assessment.

official_competitions.name: DRIVE35: Scale Up Fund
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: UK registered business can lead, but project must create scale-up manufacturing facilities for zero emission vehicle technologies.

official_competitions.name: Consumer Led Flexibility for the Clean Energy Superpower Mission
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Single applicants or collaborations; UK business, RTO, charity, not-for-profit, public sector organisation, or academic institution can lead.
local_gates: Waiting for funder eligibility checks and assessment.

official_competitions.name: Innovation Loans Expression of Interest
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Expression of Interest for loans, not grant funding.

official_competitions.name: Full ADOPT Grant: Round 8
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Active farming, growing or forestry business based in England must lead and collaborate with another farming business.

official_competitions.name: ACTASAP Pilot Phase 1
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: UK registered academic institution must work alone or lead.

official_competitions.name: Accelerated Knowledge Transfer Partnerships 6 (AKT 6)
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Lead must be UK higher education/further education institution, RTO, or Catapult; collaborating business must have four or more FTE.

official_competitions.name: Commercialising Knowledge Assets Fund (CKAF) Autumn
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Lead must be PRSE, UKRI wholly owned institute, or eligible public sector body undertaking research as a primary function.

official_competitions.name: Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Energy Efficiency
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; UK registered business can lead and must collaborate with other UK registered organisations.

official_competitions.name: Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Electric Power
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; UK registered business can lead and must collaborate with other UK registered organisations.

official_competitions.name: Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Alternative Fuels
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; UK registered business can lead and must collaborate with other UK registered organisations.

official_competitions.name: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Pre-deployment trials
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; UK registered business can lead and must collaborate with other UK registered organisations.

official_competitions.name: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Feasibility studies
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; UK registered business can lead and must collaborate with other UK registered organisations.

official_competitions.name: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Deployment trials
official_competitions.official_eligibility_signal: Collaborations only; UK registered business can lead and must collaborate with other UK registered organisations.

controls: No partner invitation, upload, email, award terms acceptance, or Project Impact submit attempted.
No unsupported eligibility, partner, asset, facility, cost, or budget claim invented.
